expression.expression: * EXCEPT(`state_fips_code`, `county_fips_code`, `Percentage Below Poverty Level`, `AMI`, `Housing units`, `Median Monthly Housing Cost- Owner`, `Median Monthly Housing Cost  - Renter`, `percent income paid as rent`)
COUNT((CASE WHEN ((geoid IS NULL) OR (CAST(geoid AS STRING) = '')) THEN NULL ELSE 1 END))

CAST((CASE WHEN ((AMI > 0) AND (AMI < 27750)) THEN 'Extremly Low' WHEN ((AMI > 27750) AND (AMI <= 41450)) THEN 'Very Low    ' WHEN ((AMI > 41450) AND (AMI <= 66300)) THEN 'Low         ' WHEN ((AMI > 66300) AND (AMI <= 96120)) THEN 'Moderate    ' WHEN (AMI > 96120) THEN 'Upper       ' ELSE 'None        ' END) AS STRING)
(CASE WHEN (`Median Monthly Housing Cost- Owner` < 0) THEN 0 ELSE `Median Monthly Housing Cost- Owner` END)
(CASE WHEN (`Median Monthly Housing Cost  - Renter` < 0) THEN 0 ELSE `Median Monthly Housing Cost  - Renter` END)
* EXCEPT(`median monthly housing cost- owner`, `median monthly housing cost  - renter`)

fileTabs.content: select  CAST (`Total housing units` AS INT64) as `Total housing units` ,  CAST (`Total vacant houses` AS INT64) as `Total vacant houses` ,  CAST (`For rent` AS INT64) as `For rent` ,  CAST (`Rentedcomma not occupied` AS INT64) as `Rentedcomma not occupied` ,  CAST (`For sale only` AS INT64) as `For sale only` ,  CAST (`Soldcomma not occupied` AS INT64) as `Soldcomma not occupied` ,  CAST (`For seasonalcomma recreationalcomma or occasional use` AS INT64) as `For seasonalcomma recreationalcomma or occasional use` ,  CAST (`For migrant workers` AS INT64) as `For migrant workers` ,  CAST (`Other vacant` AS INT64) as `Other vacant` , *   REPLACE( Geoid as `Geoid` ) from Formula_50_0

fields.name: For seasonalcomma recreationalcomma or occasional use

expression.expression: CAST (((`Sum_For rent` / `Sum_Total vacant houses`) * 100) AS INT64)
CAST (((`Sum_Rentedcomma not occupied` / `Sum_Total vacant houses`) * 100) AS INT64)
CAST (((`Sum_For sale only` / `Sum_Total vacant houses`) * 100) AS INT64)
CAST (((`Sum_Soldcomma not occupied` / `Sum_Total vacant houses`) * 100) AS INT64)
CAST (((`Sum_For migrant workers` / `Sum_Total vacant houses`) * 100) AS INT64)
* EXCEPT(`sum_for sale only`, `sum_rentedcomma not occupied`, `sum_for rent`, `sum_for migrant workers`, `sum_soldcomma not occupied`)
